bank.retain_mission: Extract code-review patterns, onboarding playbooks, git-workflow conventions, technical-writing standards, and integration-development outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about review/PR conventions, branching strategy, doc style, and onboarding pain points. Ignore one-off PR comments.

mental_models.name: Review & Branching
mental_models.source_query: What code-review and git-workflow conventions does the team follow? Include CI gates and PR templates.

mental_models.name: Docs & Onboarding
mental_models.source_query: What technical-writing standards and onboarding playbooks work? Include the README/runbook structure.
